name: ASP.NET Misconfiguration: Use of Identity Impersonation
description: An ASP.NET application is configured to run with impersonated credentials, potentially granting the application unnecessary elevated privileges beyond what is required for its operation.
detection_pattern: META node (ASP.NET configuration) enables identity impersonation, causing AUTH node to operate with elevated or client-derived credentials. The application's CONTROL flow executes under privileges exceeding the principle of least privilege.
